subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from the One who is Remembered be unto him who hath believed in God, when mankind turned away from Him, that he may rejoice and be among the thankful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المذکور لمن آمن بالله اذ اعرض عنه العباد لیفرح و یکون من الشاکرین
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prophecy and fulfillment, @station of the Manifestation of God, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
